evals.prompt: 帮我把 Attention Is All You Need 这篇论文导入到本地 papers 目录，下载 PDF、LaTeX、Markdown，并找代码仓库。
evals.expected_output: Create a finalized papers folder with metadata.yaml, paper.pdf, paper.md, LaTeX assets when available, and repo discovery results.
expectations: The workflow starts from the paper title only and does not require DOI or arXiv ID input.
The metadata contains non-empty confirmed_venue, method_name, and foldername fields.
paper/paper.pdf and paper/paper.md are produced and recorded in metadata assets.
If arXiv LaTeX is available, paper/ contains LaTeX files and assets.latex_dir is set.
repo_search.json is written and repo discovery results are stored in metadata.

evals.prompt: 下载 BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding，只给标题，不提供 DOI；需要 Markdown 和代码仓库。
evals.expected_output: Resolve metadata from the title, finalize the venue/method folder name, generate Markdown, and store repo search results or clone a confident repository.
expectations: The skill resolves metadata from the title without asking for DOI.
The finalized foldername follows the venueyear-lastname-method contract after the model confirmation step.
The metadata assets include paper.pdf and paper.md.
The repo search stores either a selected repository or a non-empty list of candidates.

evals.prompt: 把 ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks 这篇论文存到本地，尽量找实现，但如果没有高置信度仓库也要保留 repo 搜索结果。
evals.expected_output: Import the paper assets successfully even if no repository is cloned, and preserve repo search evidence for later review.
expectations: The paper import still completes the metadata, PDF, and Markdown steps even if no repo is cloned.
repo_search.json is generated regardless of whether a medium/high-confidence repo is found.
The final metadata distinguishes between cloned repo assets and recorded-only repo candidates.
